title: Freddy FazCreator
description: Makes the Creator (Music Box) music disc play Freddy's music box from FNAF 10% of the time
body:
# Freddy FazCreator
A simple resource pack that gives the Creator (Music Box) music disc a 10% chance to play Freddy Fazbear's music box from FNAF instead.
## Want to change the chance?
It's easy - just open the resource pack, go to assets/minecraft/sounds.json, and add or remove records/creator_music_box entries until you have the ratio you want :)
## Disclaimer
Does not add Freddy Fazbear
